title: The Flavor of My Strict Aunt's Lips
overview: Tsuyoshi, a third-year college student, leads a lazy life drinking cheap and tasty canned chuhai. One day, his aunt, Yui Koriyama, who he has a soft spot for, pays him an unexpected visit.

title: The Flavor of a Sun-Kissed Gyaru's Lips
overview: On a midsummer's day, Tsuyoshi heads to the convenience store to get chuhai, and reunites with Ai Natsuno, his junior from high school. Ai is now married, with a huge makeover as a sun-kissed gyaru, but acts like a spoiled child around Tsuyoshi, just like she used to.

title: The Flavor of a Married Club Senpai's Lips
overview: Tsuyoshi starts an online drinking session with his two guy friends, and the college idol senpai, Miki Kanzaki. As Miki gets drunk from canned chuhai and exposes herself on screen, Tsuyoshi and the gang can't take their eyes off her.

title: The Flavor of My Russian Friend's Sister's Lips
overview: Tsuyoshi goes round Joseph's house and meets his older sister and married Russian beauty, Anastasia. The three have canned chuhai, but Anastasia gets dead drunk and mistakes Tsuyoshi for her younger brother. He ends up taking care of her, but...

title: The Flavor of a Mysterious, Tanuki-Faced Married Woman's Lips
overview: One night when Tsuyoshi was wandering around town with canned chuhai in his hand, he meets a wild tanuki, and gets led to a big mansion. There he meets a tanuki-faced beauty, Tamami Miyazawa, who gives him a warm reception, but for a certain reason...

title: The Flavor of a Baby-Faced, Cheeky Married Woman's Lips
overview: By chance, Tsuyoshi ends up having a one-night stand with Nozomi Kuji, a married woman who looks too young for her age. Since then, they've become canned chuhai drinking buddies. In the midst of this, Nozomi vents out her frustration about her busty-loving hubby, and Tsuyoshi gets lectured on the appeal of small breasts...

title: The Flavor of an Otherworldly, Married Dark Elf's Lips
overview: Tsuyoshi enters a parallel universe and saves a dark elf beauty, Symphis with the skill he gained from the chuhai god. Tsuyoshi gradually becomes drawn to Symphis as she talks about her husband, but something doesn't add up...

title: The Flavor of a Quiet Former Rebel, the Barbershop Owner's Lips
overview: As Tsuyoshi goes to his regular barbershop, the quiet forty-odd beauty owner, Sari Kirihara, announces that the shop will be closing down. Tsuyoshi ends up drinking canned chuhai at Sari's house without the presence of her husband, but realizing her secret feelings, tries to snuggle up to her...
